message:
🐛 Fix Kagenti card fonts to match standard cards (#813)

- Add fontFamily to SVG element in Agent Topology so text renders in
  Inter instead of browser default sans-serif
- Replace hardcoded text-gray-* colors with theme tokens
  (text-foreground, text-muted-foreground) across Kagenti cards
- Remove excessive /60 opacity modifiers on text content that made
  card text appear lighter than standard cards
- Use currentColor fill on SVG text so it respects the theme

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
